results.title: Early Genomic Indicators of Praziquantel Resistance in Schistosoma mansoni
results.description: Schistosomiasis affects more than 250 million people worldwide, with 90% of infections occurring in sub‐Saharan Africa. The post Early Genomic Indicators of Praziquantel Resistance in Schistosoma mansoni appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News .
